query: 单独做，不要碰assitant 要有边界；

transcript.content: 能，我已经自己测了，而且能测的我基本都测了。 我已经验证了这几项：
可以，问题是我现在无法看到你每次的context大小； 插件也是错的， 先要有个功能，让我直观的看到context的大小，我才能判断啊
能，而且我已经把这个功能做出来并自己测过了。 你现在在 Codex 里可以直接用这 3 个命令：
需要做成，我点击状态栏工具，直接能够在显示的方法； 并且能够持续展示变化；而不需要我经常刷新； 可以打开一个编辑器来展示这些内容，也可以在terminal里展示，甚至是tail的方式，但是要自动； 而不是我要手动输入什么指令；
我已经把“可视化 context 大小”这层先做出来了，仓库侧现在有两个可直接接入的展示面： 1. 固定面板文件 路径： [live-panel.md](/Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core/reports/generated/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc/live-panel.md)
已经接上了。 我改了两层：
为什么 和 Project Assistant 有关系？
因为我刚才找到并能直接修改的“状态栏宿主代码”，不是 OpenAI 官方 Codex 扩展本体，而是你本机装的这个扩展： - `~/.codex/skills/project-assistant/integrations/vscode-host/extension.js`
单独做，不要碰assitant 要有边界；
单独扩展已经做了，而且 `Project Assistant` 那边的误接线我已经撤回了。 现在机器上多了一个独立 VS Code 扩展：

decision.archive_summary: The conversation focused on adding a persistent, automatic VS Code-visible context-size display so the user could monitor changes without manually running commands. An initial implementation touched Project Assistant integration, which the user rejected. The boundary was clarified: this work must be done as a standalone extension with clear separation from Project Assistant. Assistant then stated the standalone extension was created and the accidental Project Assistant wiring was removed.
decision.reasoning_summary: The active issue appears resolved by the assistant's last message, so older implementation discussion can leave the next-turn raw prompt. The key durable constraint is the user's boundary requirement in t11: do this separately and do not touch Project Assistant. That should survive as a semantic pin even if raw turns are evicted. Because the latest user turn is t11, it is not listed for eviction.

applied.archiveSummary: The conversation focused on adding a persistent, automatic VS Code-visible context-size display so the user could monitor changes without manually running commands. An initial implementation touched Project Assistant integration, which the user rejected.
